chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 638 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Ajay Kumar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar Awan, Advocate for Pakistan Railways Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Muhammad Yakoob Khokhar, General Manager, Postal Life Insurance Lahore and Abid Ibraheem, Assistant Superintendent, Lahore are present and submit that some documents i.e. Attested Last pay certificate of deceased, ii) Claimant’s No marriage certificate, iii) Claimant’s life certificate, iv) Deceased’s CNIC cancellation Certificate from NADRA, v) NADRA verysis of deceased and claimant, (vi) Claimant Bank Account Maintenance Certificate with IBAN Number and copy of cheque book, vii) Phone number of claimant, (viii) Details of deceased’s children, Railway Cards with coy of CNICs, ix) copy of claimant’s pension payment order (PPO), x) Indemnity Bond on Judicial Stamp Paper from witness No.1 Mr. Roshan bearing CNIC NO.45504-1133384-7 with copy of new CNIC and xi) Claimant’s sole widow certificate on Judicial Stamp paper (In original) are required. Counsel for the petitioner handed over some documents to the officer in open Court. He also undertakes that all the remaining required documents will be provided to the Respondents. The officers present in Court undertake that case of the petitioner will be processed and payment will be made to the petitioner within three weeks. Under these circumstances, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents to comply with their undertaking; in case of failure, contempt proceeding will initiated against them.

Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
